data.description:
Duration: 12 turns

Range: 120’

One non-magical, normal animal is doubled in size and strength when this spell is cast upon it.

▶ Damage: The damage inflicted by the animal’s attacks is doubled.

▶ Load: The amount of weight the animal can carry is doubled.

Restrictions: This spell may be used on giant versions of normal animals, but intelligent animals and fantastic monsters are unaffected.
